title: Implement secretx-k8s backend
description: Implement the Kubernetes Secret backend. Stub README exists at secretx-k8s/README.md. URI: secretx:k8s:<namespace>/<secret-name>?key=<data-key>. Auth: in-cluster ServiceAccount token auto-detected, falls back to KUBECONFIG. Reads native Secret objects; designed as a consumer of what ESO or Secrets Store CSI Driver materializes. Without ?key=, requires the Secret to have exactly one key (else InvalidUri). Implements SecretStore and WritableSecretStore.
